name: irving-frias/drupal-watcher
description: Drupal file watcher — monitors custom modules/themes and auto-runs drush cr. Supports DDEV, Lando, and local environments.

post-install-cmd: cd vendor/irving-frias/drupal-watcher && go build -o bin/drupal-watcher-go ./cmd/drupal-watcher 2>/dev/null || @php -r "echo '⚠ Go not found. Run \'go build -o bin/drupal-watcher-go ./cmd/drupal-watcher\' to compile, or download a pre-built binary from https://github.com/irving-frias/drupal-watcher/releases\n';"
